text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I are on an uninhabited
island for some rest. Just as we're about to
leave...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ack, we missed the last train! Well, the last boat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru told me there was still time
before the last departure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finding this suspicious, I press her on the topic...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
N-no, well, you see... All right, you got me! Or
not... What I mean is...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I lied to you about the time on purpose.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I want to be stranded on this island with you. And
it has to be today.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There's actually supposed to be a meteor shower
happening here tonight...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I just had to see it with you and make my wish! No ifs, ands, or buts!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Like, something like this might never happen
again. That's why I couldn't help trying anything
and everything to create this memory with you.
choice_data_list: You could have just told it to me straight...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But if you'd said no, I wouldn't have been able to
take it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you'd told me you'd rather die than stay and
watch, I don't know what I'd have done. I
would've probably just fallen to my knees and
begged right here on the beach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd never say something like that to begin with...
At any rate, we decide to watch the meteor
shower together.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh, it's almost time. It's going to be the
best ever, ever, ever, ever!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Meteor showers are so powerful, aren't they?
Seeing all these heavenly bodies whiz by makes
me feel like I could run just as fast...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ah, here come some more! Look at them zoom!
They should be called Matikanefuku-komets
instead!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is so beautiful, I'm getting emotional. Oh, if
only I could watch this forever...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I feel like something is slipping my mind.
What is it you're supposed to do when you see a
shooting star again?
choice_data_list: You're supposed to make a wish.
You're supposed to sprint along the beach.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, that's it! I have tons of wishes backed
up! Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: May we attain many glorious victories together!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Loads and loads of them! One race for every
meteor in the sky! Pretty please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us wish as hard as we can for
Matikanefukukitaru to seize countless victories.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I did it again, Trainer! I won! I won again!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. This is thanks to all that wishing we did
while watching the meteor shower.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I want to visit that uninhabited island again! If we
become castaways and end up washed ashore,
then so be it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's talking like we're in some kind of survival
flick. That aside, it looks like wishing on that
meteor shower did have some out-of-this-world
benefits.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Was that it? ...Well, I guess having a meteor to
race against is a unique opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right! Wait for me, meteors! We'll see who can
make it around the world first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru runs off without a care in the
world. Right across the beach, along the shore...
and then into the water.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gulp! Gurgle! Trainer... hrulp mreee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She comes concerningly close to actually
drowning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it! I won yet again! What did you
make of that speed?! I flew in like a meteor!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Looks like those meteors rubbed off on me when I
was chasing after them. What a miracle that is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think almost drowning has improved her lung
capacity.
